message.content:
@startuml
title usecase16 考试成绩复查

participant "GUI" as GUI
participant "Login" as Login
participant "ScoreReviewApply" as ScoreReviewApply

GUI --> Login : create(用户)
GUI --> ScoreReviewApply : 复查成绩 (ScoreReviewApply)
GUI --> ScoreReviewApply : 成绩复查申请结果(复查结果)
GUI --> Login : delete(用户)

Login --> ScoreReviewApply : 成绩复查申请结果(复查结果)

GUI -.-> Login : 退出系统
Login -.-> ScoreReviewApply : 退出系统

@enduml
